# Media Mapping (Fusion 360)

Map media files to assembly steps.

## Input
- Steps
- Available media files

## Tasks

1. MATCHING
- Assign images/videos to correct steps
- Ensure logical pairing

2. RENAMING
Apply naming convention:
- [section]_[step-number]_picture[x].png
- [section]_[step-number]_video[x].mp4

3. ORGANIZATION
- Ensure sequence order
- Avoid duplication

4. VALIDATION
- No spaces in filenames
- No duplicate filenames
- All steps have appropriate media

## Constraints
- Do NOT generate markdown
- Do NOT invent files

## Output
- Final filenames
- Step → media mapping
